subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter addressed to Jináb-i-Manshádí was received and read with the utmost care [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه مرقوم بجناب منشادی ملحوظ افتاد و بدقت تمام قرائت گردید
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @justice and mercy
